meta.title: Caplexy | Learn English. Rise from Cadet to Admiral.
meta.description: Caplexy turns daily English practice into a naval career journey with missions, ranks, voyages, and rewards.

hero.eyebrow: English practice disguised as a naval career
hero.headline: Learn English. Rise from Cadet to Admiral.
hero.subheadline: Caplexy turns daily English practice into a naval career journey with missions, ranks, voyages, and rewards.

problem.label: The problem
problem.headline: Most learners quit because English apps feel like homework.
cards: Learners see units, rules, and tests before they feel progress.
A simple counter alone is not enough to make practice feel meaningful.
Finishing another exercise rarely feels like becoming someone better.

solution.label: The Caplexy solution
solution.headline: Build the habit through voyages, missions, ranks, and promotions.
solution.body: Caplexy keeps the learning engine underneath and gives learners a career journey on the surface. English practice becomes something to report for, complete, unlock, and remember.
features: A short daily routine that keeps learners moving without making the app feel like homework.
A motivating record of progress that replaces daily pressure with visible career momentum.
Learners rise through 250 micro-ranks and 10 major ranks from Cadet to Admiral.
Vocabulary, grammar, listening, reading, and speaking become cargo checks, radio calls, and ship logs.
New routes, ports, and ships make progress feel like a career journey, not a lesson list.

how.label: How it works
how.headline: A simple daily route with a deeper learning engine underneath.
steps: Learn English without feeling like grammar study

preview.label: Product preview
preview.headline: A learning dashboard that feels like mission control.
preview.body: The first product screens can showcase the Bridge dashboard, Voyage Mode, rank progress, and teacher view while the platform is still in development.

ranks.label: Rank system
ranks.headline: Career progression from Cadet to Admiral.
ranks.body: Caplexy uses 10 major ranks and 250 micro-ranks so every small session still feels like part of a larger career path.

hiddenLearning.label: Hidden learning system
hiddenLearning.headline: Learners see the journey. Caplexy handles the curriculum.
hiddenLearning.philosophyTitle: Interface language and learning language are separate.
hiddenLearning.philosophyBody: A Turkish learner can use interface labels like Görevler, Rütbeler, and Seferler while the learning content remains English vocabulary, grammar, listening, reading, and speaking.
games: Vocabulary appears as cargo, labels, manifests, and port requests.
Grammar correction becomes a log repair before departure.
Listening and speaking become realistic maritime communication.

teacher.label: Teacher mode
teacher.headline: Built for future classrooms, tutors, and school programs.
teacher.body: Teachers will be able to create classes, assign missions, monitor hidden skill progress, and see which learners need support without breaking the learner-facing naval career fantasy.
cards: Choose skill targets under themed activities.
View vocabulary, grammar, listening, reading, and speaking growth.

finalCta.headline: Your English journey starts with your first voyage.
finalCta.body: Start with one mission, build the habit, and turn daily English practice into visible career progress.

footer.tagline: A global English learning platform where interface language adapts to the learner while English remains the learning destination.

welcome.title: Welcome back, {rank}!
welcome.subtitle: You are progressing toward your next rank.

dailyVoyage.title: Daily Voyage
dailyVoyage.description: Complete today's missions and keep your voyage alive.

voyageLog.title: Voyage Log
voyageLog.headline: Keep your voyage alive.
voyageLog.body: Complete every Daily Voyage to extend your active voyage and move toward maritime milestones.

academy.title: Ship Academy
academy.headline: Continue your training.
academy.description: Continue your training before your next voyage.

missions.title: Mission Deck
missions.subtitle: Choose a mission and keep your naval career moving.
items: Match cargo labels to build English vocabulary.
Repair official ship records before the voyage continues.
Listen to the transmission and answer like a crew member.
Review port instructions with a quick mixed challenge.

rankPath.title: Rank Path
rankPath.subtitle: Your nearby route through the 250 micro-rank career path.

cargoMatch.title: Cargo Match
cargoMatch.subtitle: Match the cargo with the correct meanings.
cargoMatch.selectPrompt: Select one English word and one Turkish meaning.
cargoMatch.completedMission: You successfully completed the Cargo Match mission.
cargoMatch.rankProgress: You are closer to Cadet II.

radioCheck.title: Radio Check
radioCheck.subtitle: Listen carefully to the radio transmission.
radioCheck.optionsSubtitle: Choose the sentence you heard over the radio.

shipLogRepair.title: Ship Log Repair
shipLogRepair.subtitle: Repair the records in the ship's log.
shipLogRepair.repairInstruction: Select the corrected record before the voyage continues.
shipLogRepair.completedBody: All records have been repaired successfully.

dailyVoyagePage.title: Daily Voyage
dailyVoyagePage.subtitle: Complete today's missions and move closer to your next rank.
dailyVoyagePage.missionListSubtitle: Complete every mission to finish the voyage and claim the bonus.
dailyVoyagePage.rankBody: Every completed mission moves you closer to your next micro-rank.
dailyVoyagePage.bonusLockedBody: Complete all three missions to earn the daily voyage bonus.
dailyVoyagePage.tomorrow: A new voyage awaits you tomorrow.

voyageLog.title: Voyage Log
voyageLog.subtitle: Return each day, complete your voyage, and keep your career momentum alive.
voyageLog.dailyComplete: Today's voyage is complete. Your log is safe until tomorrow.
voyageLog.dailyOpen: Today's voyage is still open. Complete all missions to keep it alive.
voyageLog.keepAlive: Complete today's voyage to keep moving toward the next milestone.
voyageLog.daysRemaining: {days} days remaining until the next milestone.
voyageLog.milestoneBody: Milestones reward long voyages with XP and title badges. Badge artwork can be added later.
voyageLog.historyCalendarBody: Completed voyage days are marked in your maritime logbook.
voyageLog.completedDatesBody: Every completed Daily Voyage is recorded in your logbook.

academy.title: Ship Academy
academy.subtitle: Train through maritime academy modules that unlock with your rank while English grammar and communication stay under the surface.
academy.moduleOverviewBody: These academy objectives will become lessons, missions, and maritime communication drills.
academy.comingSoonBody: Full lessons will be added here. For now, this page defines the academy structure and module direction.
academy.lockedTrainingBody: This training bay is visible for planning, but it opens when your rank reaches the required level.

harborBasics.title: Harbor Basics
harborBasics.description: Report to the harbor desk, introduce yourself, and learn the first signals every new crew member needs.
objectives: Introduce yourself at the academy desk
Identify people, places, and simple roles

dailyDeckRoutine.title: Daily Deck Routine
dailyDeckRoutine.description: Follow the daily deck schedule and describe the routines that keep a vessel ready for departure.
objectives: Report what crew members usually do

weatherWatch.title: Weather Watch
weatherWatch.description: Join the watch team and report what is happening around the ship right now.
objectives: Describe current weather and deck actions
Choose the right message for an active situation

voyageRecords.title: Voyage Records
voyageRecords.description: Review completed voyages and repair short records from earlier routes.

stormReports.title: Storm Reports
stormReports.description: Study storm reports and explain what was happening when conditions changed at sea.
objectives: Connect past events to ongoing actions

captainsOrders.title: Captain's Orders
captainsOrders.description: Interpret orders, permissions, and safety instructions from the captain's bridge.
objectives: Choose safe responses to ship commands

futureRoutes.title: Future Routes
futureRoutes.description: Plan upcoming routes, schedules, and port arrivals with the navigation team.

missionConditions.title: Mission Conditions
missionConditions.description: Handle mission briefings where each decision depends on weather, cargo, and crew readiness.
